text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Takarazuka Kinen. Before the
race, Mejiro Palmer and Daitaku Helios bring as
much hype as they can in the paddock.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Grandmother Mejiro absent from the crowd
and her bestie beside her, Mejiro Palmer can be
herself. With that firmly in mind, she heads into
the race.
